mapper.select: SELECT SUBSTRING(ci.TSTM_YMD, 7) AS dd, count(*) AS total, sum(CASE WHEN co.TSTM_YMD IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS outCnt FROM CARD_INPUT ci LEFT JOIN CARD_OUTPUT co ON ci.TSTM_YMD = co.TSTM_YMD AND ci.TSTM_NO = co.TSTM_NO AND ci.BRCD = co.BRCD WHERE ci.HDQR_BOB_DCD = 2 AND ci.TSTM_YMD LIKE '202409%' GROUP BY SUBSTRING(ci.TSTM_YMD, 7)

SELECT SUBSTRING(ci.TSTM_YMD, 7) AS dd, count(*) AS total, sum(CASE WHEN co.TSTM_YMD IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(ci.BDGT_ITEX_FRCS_CON, co.BDMN_ITEX_MNGM_NO) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt1, sum(CASE WHEN co.TSTM_YMD IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(ci.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON, concat(co.BRCD, '-', co.BDGT_BSNS_FRCS_CON)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt2, sum(CASE WHEN co.TSTM_YMD IS NOT NULL AND INSTR(ci.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON, TRIM(co.BDGT_PRFR_RSN_FRCS_CON)) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS hitCnt3 FROM CARD_OUTPUT ci INNER JOIN CARD_LEARNING_DATA co ON ci.TSTM_YMD = co.TSTM_YMD AND ci.TSTM_NO = co.TSTM_NO AND ci.BRCD = co.BRCD WHERE ci.HDQR_BOB_DCD = 2 AND ci.TSTM_YMD BETWEEN '20240901' AND '20240908' GROUP BY SUBSTRING(ci.TSTM_YMD, 7)
